text:
## Headline

Nimbus management used the earnings call to detail integration plans for the Cirrus Analytics acquisition, raise full-year margin guidance, and reiterate revenue guidance.

## Q&A signals

- On Cirrus integration, Daniel Cho said "we expect native Cirrus query capabilities to be generally available inside the Stratus console by the end of fiscal Q4 2026." [Q1]
- On the margin raise, Helena Vargas attributed "about 60 basis points to the hiring slowdown" and "about 40 basis points to underlying gross-margin improvement in Stratus." [Q2]
- On hyperscaler competition, Daniel Cho noted "our win rate against the hyperscaler-native offerings remained above 75 percent in Q2 in competitive deals we tracked." [Q7]

## Commitments

- Management expects to close the previously announced Cirrus Analytics acquisition by the end of fiscal Q3 2026, citing material expansion in real-time log analytics. [K1]
- Full-year fiscal 2026 non-GAAP operating margin is now expected at approximately 19 percent, up from prior guidance of 18 percent. [K4]
- Full-year fiscal 2026 revenue guidance was reiterated in the range previously communicated. [K6]
